description_long: This is a robust sledgehammer-style axe featuring a thick, rectangular double-sided metal head with slightly rounded edges and a central raised circular emblem on each face. The head is a dark gray metallic color, suggesting it is forged from steel or iron, and appears solid and heavy. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and made of wood, with a natural brown finish and a visible grain pattern. The lower portion of the handle is wrapped in a darker, textured grip, likely leather or synthetic material, for improved handling and comfort. The overall design is utilitarian, with no ornate decorations except for the circular emblem, making it suitable for heavy-duty tasks in urban environments such as demolition or construction. The proportions and build indicate it is designed for two-handed use, providing significant striking force.
description: A heavy-duty sledgehammer-style axe with a thick, double-sided metal head and a straight wooden handle wrapped with a textured grip. Features a central circular emblem on each side of the head.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the double-sided metal head and the circular emblem, with the straight wooden handle and grip clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the metal head and the cylindrical profile of the handle, with the grip wrapping visible at the bottom.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the opposite face of the head with an identical circular emblem and the full handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the head's thickness and the handle's straight alignment, similar to view 1.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical wooden handle with a visible grain, wrapped in a textured grip at the lower end for secure handling.
attribute_blade_design: Thick, rectangular double-sided metal head with slightly rounded edges and a central raised circular emblem on each face; no sharp cutting edge, designed for blunt force.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the head fitted onto the handle, no visible pins or bolts.
